nodes.name: Forbidden Knowledge
nodes.altText: Each point of intelligence grants 4% ward retention and improves skills that rely on carefully studied magic, such .

nodes.name: Mania of Mortality
nodes.description: Whenever a nearby enemy, ally, or minion dies, you have a 10% chance to gain ward.
nodes.altText: Ward is an overshield shield that protects your health. It has no maximum and decays over time.

stats.statName: Chance To Gain Ward On Nearby Death

nodes.name: Stolen Vitality
nodes.altText: Each point of vitality grants 6 health and 1% poison and necrotic resistance.

nodes.name: Ethereal Revenant
nodes.description: When damage leaves you below half health, you summon a {Revenant,} a melee minion with decaying health whose damage scales with your intelligence . This effect has a 15 second cooldown.
nodes.altText: The more modifier to the revenant's damage and health is multiplicative with other modifiers.

nodes.name: Blood Pact
nodes.description: You deal increased damage, but you lose a percent of your maximum health each second if you have killed an enemy recently (last 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Putrid Demise
nodes.description: You have additional poison resistance, and whenever you kill an enemy you have a chance to inflict poison on the enemies around them.

stats.statName: Chance To Poison Nearby Enemies On Kill

nodes.name: Elixir of Hunger
nodes.description: You have additional health, and when you use a potion you and your minions are imbued with {Hunger,} granting 10% increased attack and cast speed and 10 health gained on hit.
nodes.altText: Hunger does not stack.

nodes.name: Unbound Necromancy
nodes.altText: Affects your {Summon Skeleton} skill, but not {Summon Skeletal Mage}.

nodes.name: Life Drinker
nodes.description: Whenever you use a potion you also consume a random minion, killing it to restore health. The health gained in this manner is equal to a percentage of the minion's current health.

stats.statName: Percent Of Minion's Current HP Consumed

nodes.name: Reclamation of Souls
nodes.description: You have increased ward retention, and are granted ward whenever one of your minions die.

nodes.name: Wisp Weaver
nodes.description: Whenever you use a minion skill, you have a chance to gain ward equal to the mana spent.

nodes.name: Soul Drinker
nodes.description: You are granted a percentage of excess healing from {Life Drinker} .

nodes.name: Mark of Punishment
nodes.description:
Whenever one of your minions die, it has a chance to mark the nearest enemy for death for 5 seconds.

{Mark for Death} is a curse that lasts for 8 seconds and reduces all resistances by 25%. It cannot stack.

stats.statName: Chance To Mark Nearby Enemy On Minion Death

nodes.name: Dark Retribution
nodes.description:
Whenever one of your minions dies, you have a chance to summon a {Skeleton Vanguard} from its corpse, a minion that deals melee physical damage using a spear. You are limited to 3 active skeleton vanguards.
This node also grants additional melee physical damage to Skeleton Vanguards summoned from any source.
nodes.altText: Skeleton Vanguards are not affected by the Summon Skeleton tree.

nodes.name: Hollow Lich
nodes.description: All sources of health leech are converted to increased damage at 10 times their value.
nodes.altText:
For example, "1% of spell damage leech " would become "10% increased damage".

This does not affect your minions' health leech.

nodes.name: Cling To Life
nodes.description: Grants you Vitality and grants your minions all resistances.
nodes.altText: Each point of vitality grants 6 health and 1% poison and necrotic resistance.

nodes.name: Dance with Death
nodes.description: You deal increased damage. This bonus is tripled when you are below 35% health.

nodes.name: Harvested Legions
nodes.description:
Whenever you kill an enemy you have a chance to summon a {Skeleton Vanguard} from its corpse, a minion that deals melee physical damage using a spear. You are limited to 3 active skeleton vanguards.
This node also grants increased health to Skeleton Vanguards summoned from any source.
nodes.altText: Skeleton Vanguards are not affected by the Summon Skeleton tree.

nodes.name: Soul Barrier
nodes.description: When you drop below half health, you are granted ward. This effect has a 12 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Reaper

nodes.altText: If you have a similar effect from an item or skill tree node then the highest threshold is used.

nodes.name: Spirit Lure
nodes.description: {Soul Barrier} has a reduced cooldown.

nodes.altText: Each point of intelligence grants 4% ward retention and improves skills that rely on carefully studied magic, such .

nodes.altText: Each point of vitality grants 6 health and 1% poison and necrotic resistance.

nodes.name: Symbol of Decay

nodes.altText: Each point of intelligence grants 4% ward retention and improves skills that rely on carefully studied magic, such .

nodes.altText: Affects your {Summon Skeleton} skill, but not {Summon Skeletal Mage}.

When you take a hit while at low health you have a chance to consume one of your minions, stealing its current health to heal yourself.

nodes.name: Honour
nodes.description: You are less likely to be stunned, you have a higher chance to block hits and you take less damage from hits that you block.

nodes.name: Rahyeh's Strength
nodes.description: You have additional strength, and you deal increased fire damage if you have hit an enemy with a melee attack recently (last 4 seconds).
nodes.altText: Each point of strength increases armor by 4%, and improves skills that scale with strength, such .

stats.statName: Increased Fire Damage On Recent Melee Hit

nodes.name: Divine Bolt
nodes.description: Whenever you hit an enemy with a melee attack you have a 20% chance to cast {Divine Bolt,} a blast of holy energy that deals fire damage to a random nearby enemy.

stats.statName: Chance To Cast Divine Bolt On Melee Hit

nodes.name: Prayer
nodes.description: You have increased damage and healing effectiveness if you have healed yourself or an ally recently (last 4 seconds).
nodes.altText: Increased healing effectiveness only increases the health restored by healing skills.

nodes.name: Holy Symbol
nodes.description:
When you block you cast {Holy Symbol,} healing yourself.

This effect has a 3 second cooldown.
nodes.altText: {Holy Symbol} scales with increased healing effectiveness and gains 4% increased healing effectiveness per point of attunement.

nodes.name: Conviction
nodes.altText: Penetration can bring enemies below 0% resistance, causing them to take more damage. It applies to all damage, including damage over time.

nodes.name: Holy Nova
nodes.description: {Holy Symbol} also heals allies in an area around you.

nodes.name: Time Legion
nodes.description:
You have increased melee attack speed and your melee attacks have a chance to inflict enemies with {Time Rot.}

Your melee attacks, throwing attacks, and void spells have a higher chance to be echoed 1 second later.
nodes.altText: Movement abilities and {Anomaly} cannot echo.

nodes.name: Shared Divinity
nodes.description: {Divine Bolt} fires extra projectiles, but has a reduced chance to cast on hit.
nodes.altText: At 5 points invested in this node, Divine Bolt will have a 10% chance to cast on melee hit.

stats.statName: Reduced Chance To Cast Divine Bolt On Melee Hit

nodes.name: Penance
nodes.description: Your melee and throwing attacks have a chance to cause enemies to bleed, but you have a chance to bleed when an enemy hits you with a melee attack.

nodes.name: Piety
nodes.description: {Divine Bolt} can also target nearby allies, healing them for the amount of base fire damage it would deal.

nodes.name: Holy Icon
nodes.altText: Increased healing effectiveness increases the health restored by healing skills only.

nodes.name: Phoenix Strike
nodes.description: Your melee attacks have a chance to ignite on hit

nodes.name: Holy Precision
nodes.description: You have an increased chance to critically strike with spells and throwing attacks. You also have additional critical strike multiplier with lightning skills.

nodes.name: Redemption
nodes.description: Bleed you inflict penetrates physical resistance, and you have a chance to be granted increased damage if you have received a stack of bleeding from {Penance} recently (last 4 seconds).

nodes.name: Righteous Firebrand
nodes.description: You deal additional fire damage with melee attacks if you have cast a spell recently (last 4 seconds).

stats.statName: Melee Fire Damage On Recent Spell Cast

nodes.name: Shield Wall
nodes.description: You have a higher chance to block and you regain heath on block, but you cannot dodge.

nodes.name: Prayer Aegis
nodes.description: You have additional health and endurance threshold and gain haste for 2 second on heal while you are below your endurance threshold. This effect has a 5 second cooldown.
nodes.altText: Endurance reduces the damage you take below your endurance threshold. You have a base Endurance Threshold of 20% of your maximum health. Endurance is capped at 60%.

stats.statName: Haste On Heal When Below Endurance Threshold

nodes.name: Sword of Rahyeh
nodes.description: Your melee attacks have an additional chance to ignite enemies if you have directly casted a spell recently (last 4 seconds).

stats.statName: Melee Ignite Chance On Recent Spell Cast

nodes.name: Blinding Light
nodes.description: Your hits have a chance to blind enemies and you have higher endurance.
nodes.altText: Endurance reduces the damage you take below your endurance threshold. You have a base Endurance Threshold of 20% of your maximum health. Endurance is capped at 60%.

nodes.name: Divine Intervention
nodes.description: While you have 3 or more {Divine Essences,} if you would die, you have a 10% chance to instead consume all Divine Essences and be returned to life at full health.

nodes.name: Divine Essence
nodes.description:
You have a chance to be granted a {Divine Essence} when you heal yourself or an ally.

Divine Essences last 10 seconds and grant 10% increased armor and healing effectiveness. They also reduce the duration of stuns on you by 10%.

You can have a maximum of 3 Divine Essences at once.
nodes.altText: Heal over time effects cannot grant a Divine Essence.

nodes.name: Alignment
nodes.description: Every 3 seconds, the next spell you cast has increased healing effectiveness.

nodes.name: Folded Steel
nodes.description:
Your manifest armour and {Forged Weapons} deal additional physical damage with their melee attacks.

You can also control an additional {Forged Weapon}.
nodes.altText: Forged Weapons are melee minions summoned on hit by Forge Strike

nodes.name: Avatar of Regret
nodes.description: Your melee attacks, throwing attacks, and void spells have a much higher chance to echo, but you have reduced melee attack speed and throwing attack speed and your skills cost more mana.
nodes.altText: Movement abilities and {Anomaly} cannot echo.

nodes.name: Time and Faith
nodes.description: You regain health and mana when you directly use Rive, Vengeance, Smite, or Multistrike.

nodes.name: Mail Crusher
nodes.description: You deal increased damage while you have a mace or sceptre equipped.

nodes.name: Blademaster
nodes.description: You have increased attack and cast speed while you have a sword or axe equipped.
nodes.altText: If you are dual wielding and have both an axe and sword equipped you still only receive the regular benefit from this node, not double.

nodes.name: Siege Captain
nodes.description: While you have a shield equipped your blocks are more effective and you deal additional physical damage with throwing attacks.

stats.statName: Physical Throwing Attack Damage with a Shield

nodes.name: Champion of the Forge
nodes.description: You deal increased melee damage if you're using a two handed weapon.

stats.statName: Increased Melee Damage with a 2h Weapon

nodes.name: Avatar of War
nodes.description: You deal increased melee damage for each hit you have taken in the past 10 seconds.

stats.statName: Increased Melee Damage per Hit Taken

nodes.name: Heavenfire
nodes.description: You have additional spell damage while you have a shield equipped.

masteries.classDescription: A former soldier of Rahyeh’s army who left their ranks to pursue a more noble path.
A fallen knight who has taken part of the void inside themselves and uses it to devastate their foes even at the cost of their own life.
passiveBonuses: Your melee attacks, throwing attacks and void spells have a 10% chance to be repeated by an echo 0.5s later (excludes movement abilities and Anomaly).

masteries.classDescription: A bulwark of strength and steel whose mastery of weapons, armor, and the animation of molten metal dominates the battlefield.
passiveBonuses: 3% increased armor for each hit you have taken in the last 10 seconds

masteries.classDescription: You are a righteous warrior, your conviction empowering your allies and burning away the dark with righteous fire.
passiveBonuses: You deal increased fire, lightning, and physical damage equal to your percent health remaining.
1% increased healing effectiveness per point of attunement
